description: Seen briefly on the ground, bird was buffy tan with dark streaks down the sides of the breast and a plain face with large prominent dark eye.Behaviors: The bird fly in and landed next to a wet playa surrounded by ag lands walked around for a half minute then flew across the rd and dropped like a rock on folded wings into ankle high native grass.Call: Squeet Squeet or Skeet skeet, often doubled sometimes singlePlumage: adult
